message:
Rename editor from Diffs to Modern

- Rebrand product name, window title, and Tauri identifier to Modern/dev.modern
- Rename npm workspace scope from @diffs-io to @moderndev
- Rename Rust crate from diffs/diffs_lib to modern/modern_lib
- Rename extension IDs from diffs.* to modern.*
- Export runtime API as `modern` with backward-compatible `diffs` alias
- Migrate default config/state dir from ~/.diffs to ~/.modern
- Rename env vars to MODERN_STATE_PATH/MODERN_SETTINGS_PATH (with fallbacks)
- Update dockview theme and editor theme names
- Update all imports, tests, and lockfiles

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ayt1tamyjtsvy7v2couw2pxr

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ edition = "2021"
 # The `_lib` suffix may seem redundant but it is necessary

-name = "diffs_lib"
